typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Unit_Nbr as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Complex_Id as string,
		Yard_Id as string,
		Carrier_Visit_Key as long,
		Event_Type_Id as string,
		Move_Kind as string,
		From_Location as string,
		To_Location as string,
		From_Position_Name as string,
		To_Position_Name as string,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id as integer,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Id as short,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind as string,
		Carry_CHE_Id as short,
		Carry_CHE_Kind as string,
		Put_CHE_Id as short,
		Put_CHE_Kind as string,
		QC_CHE_Id as short,
		QC_CHE_Kind as string,
		t_carry_complete as string,
		t_put as string,
		t_fetch as string,
		t_dispatch as string,
		t_discharge as string,
		t_carry_dispatch as string,
		t_carry_fetch_ready as string,
		t_carry_put_ready as string,
		dist_carry as short,
		dist_start as integer,
		Twin_Fetch as boolean,
		Twin_Carry as boolean,
		Twin_Put as boolean,
		Category_Id as string,
		Freight_Kind_Id as string,
		to_pos_gkey as long,
		fm_pos_gkey as long,
		Restow_Reason as string,
		Container_Line_Id as string,
		Container_Line_Role as string,
		pow as string,
		mve_gkey as long,
		ufv_gkey as long,
		Berth_Id as string,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg as double,
		active_ufv as long,
		Requires_Power_Flag as boolean,
		OOG_Flag as boolean,
		Shipper_Id as string,
		Consignee_Id as string,
		Commodity_Id as string,
		ATA as string,
		ATD as string,
		Rehandles as short
	),
	useSchema: false,
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: true,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	moveFiles: ['/bronze/moves/load','/bronze/moves/archive'],
	format: 'delimited',
	fileSystem: 'pnct',
	folderPath: 'bronze/moves/load',
	columnDelimiter: ';',
	escapeChar: '\\',
	quoteChar: '\"',
	columnNamesAsHeader: true,
	dateFormats: ['dd-MM-yyyy'],
	timestampFormats: ['yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSS\'Z\'','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'']) ~> CSV
Aggregate1 derive(t_carry_complete = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_carry_complete,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_carry_complete,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		t_discharge = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_discharge,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_discharge,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		Fetch_CHE_Id = toLong(Fetch_CHE_Id),
		QC_CHE_Id = toLong(QC_CHE_Id),
		Put_CHE_Id = toLong(Put_CHE_Id),
		Carry_CHE_Id = toLong(Carry_CHE_Id),
		Date = toDate(t_put),
		Year = year(t_put),
		Month = month(t_put),
		Week = weekOfYear(t_put),
		t_dispatch = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_dispatch,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_dispatch,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		t_carry_dispatch = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_carry_dispatch,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_carry_dispatch,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		t_carry_fetch_ready = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_carry_fetch_ready,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_carry_fetch_ready,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		t_carry_put_ready = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_carry_put_ready,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_carry_put_ready,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		ATD = coalesce(toTimestamp(ATD,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(ATD,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		ATA = coalesce(toTimestamp(ATA,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(ATA,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss'))) ~> DataTypeConversion
Select2 select(mapColumn(
		each(match(true()),
			regexReplace($$,' ','_') = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Select1
Select1 aggregate(groupBy(mve_gkey),
	each(match(name!='mve_gkey'), $$ = first($$))) ~> Aggregate1
derivedColumn1 select(mapColumn(
		each(match(/* All input columns */true()),
			/* Input name */$$ = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Select2
DataTypeConversion alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
CSV derive({Carrier Visit Key} = toLong(Carrier_Visit_Key),
		mve_gkey = toLong(mve_gkey),
		t_put = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_put,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_put,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		t_fetch = coalesce(toTimestamp(t_fetch,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(t_fetch,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		ufv_gkey = toLong(ufv_gkey)) ~> derivedColumn1
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'pnct',
	folderPath: 'silver/moves',
	mergeSchema: false,
	autoCompact: false,
	optimizedWrite: false,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['mve_gkey'],
	umask: 0777,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sink1
